memoryArtifacts.headline: Sir John Hawkwood II, Condotiere General of Milan
memoryArtifacts.description: This image is Sir John Hawkwood II, Condotiere General of Milan, the famous general of the Italian Wars. His father had two sons who both lived and were given the given name of John. The first son of this name I call John Hawkwood I, "The Elder" for was was the first born son. The more famous son in history is Sir John Hawkwood, who I have called John II, the Condotiere General of Milan. Some have mixed these two sons or have put the famous Italian portrait on the first born son, John "The Elder" rather than on Sir John Hawkwood I, Condoriere General of Milan. PLEASE DO NOT MERGE THESE TWO SON.

memoryArtifacts.headline: 1436 fresco depicting Sir John Hawkweed by Paolo Uccello

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Hawkwood II於大約1323年出生在英國艾可希布爾 丁加姆時，他的父親Gilbert Hawkwood Jr37歲，母親Margaret Hedingham24歲。他於1371年與Donnina Visconti of Milan, Italy.在英國艾可結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1394年3月17日在義大利托斯卡納費倫費倫享年72歲，埋葬在英國艾可卡素 丁加姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Hawkwood II于大约1323年出生在英国艾可希布爾 丁加姆时，他的父亲Gilbert Hawkwood Jr37岁，母亲Margaret Hedingham24岁。他于1371年与Donnina Visconti of Milan, Italy.在英国艾可结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1394年3月17日在意大利托斯卡納費倫費倫享年72岁，埋葬在英国艾可卡素 丁加姆。

nameMeanings.name: Hawkwood
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from some minor place named as ‘the hawk wood’, e.g. Hawkwoods in Sible Hedingham or Hawkwood’s Farm in Gosfield (both Essex).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Hawkwood II was born about 1323, in Sible Hedingham, Essex, England, his father, Gilbert Hawkwood Jr, was 37 and his mother, Margaret Hedingham, was 24. He married Donnina Visconti of Milan, Italy. in 1371, in Essex, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 6 daughters. He died on 17 March 1394, in Florence, Florence, Tuscany, Italy, at the age of 72, and was buried in Castle Hedingham, Essex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Hawkwood II est né environ 1323, à Sible Hedingham, Essex, Angleterre, son père, Gilbert Hawkwood Jr, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Margaret Hedingham, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Donnina Visconti of Milan, Italy. en 1371, à Essex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé le 17 mars 1394, à Firenze, Firenze, Toscana, Italie, à l’âge de 72 ans, et a été enterré à Castle Hedingham, Essex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Hawkwood II um 1323 in Sible Hedingham, Essex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gilbert Hawkwood Jr 37 und seine Mutter Margaret Hedingham 24. Er hat 1371 in Essex, England Donnina Visconti of Milan, Italy. geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 6 Töchter. Er starb am 17. März 1394 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Florenz, Firenze, Toscana, Italien und wurde in Castle Hedingham, Essex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Hawkwood II è nato il circa 1323 nel Sible Hedingham, Essex, England, il suo padre, Gilbert Hawkwood Jr, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Hedingham, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Donnina Visconti of Milan, Italy. nel 1371, nel Essex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 6 figlie. Morì il 17 marzo 1394, nel Firenze, Firenze, Toscana, Italia, all'età di 72 anni, e fu sepolto a Castle Hedingham, Essex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Hawkwood IIが約1323年にイギリスエセックスシブル ヘディンガムで生まれた時，父Gilbert Hawkwood Jrは37歳，母Margaret Hedinghamは24歳であった。1371年にイギリスエセックスでDonnina Visconti of Milan, Italy.と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1394年3月17日にイタリアトスカナフィアーエンズフィアーエンズで72歳で死去し，イギリスエセックスカストル ヘディンガムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Hawkwood II(이)가 대략 1323년 영국 에세스 시블일 헤딩함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gilbert Hawkwood Jr(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Hedingham(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1371년 영국 에세스에서 Donnina Visconti of Milan, Italy.(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1394년 3월 17일 이탈리아 토스캔아 피렌즈 피렌즈에서 72세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 에세스 카스틀 헤딩함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Hawkwood II nasceu aproximadamente 1323, em Sible Hedingham, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Gilbert Hawkwood Jr, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Hedingham, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Donnina Visconti of Milan, Italy. em 1371, em Essex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em 17 de março de 1394, em Firenze, Firenze, Toscana, Itália, com 72 anos, e foi sepultado em Castle Hedingham, Essex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Hawkwood II родился около 1323 г. в местности сибл хедингхам, эссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Gilbert Hawkwood Jr было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Hedingham, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Donnina Visconti of Milan, Italy. в 1371 г. в местности эссекс, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 6 дочерей. Он умер 17 марта 1394 г. в местности фиренз, фиренз, тоскана, Италия в возрасте 72 лет и был похоронен в местности кастл хедингхам, эссекс, Англия.

Se casó con Donnina Visconti of Milan, Italy. en 1371, en Essex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 6 hijas. Murió el 17 de marzo de 1394, en Firenze, Firenze, Toscana, Italia, a la edad de 72 años, y fue sepultado en Castle Hedingham, Essex, Inglaterra.
